narration: GlassBox brings pre-registration to trading. Audit — don't trust.
Trading influencers delete their losing calls and sell you a cherry-picked highlight reel. You can't tell real skill from survivorship bias.
On-chain trackers show what a wallet did. GlassBox proves what a strategist said they would do, in advance — like clinical-trial pre-registration, applied to trading.
Every call is computed from live Sui DeepBook markets, signed with a Sui key, and committed to Walrus before the outcome is known. Anyone can verify it.
Here's a real call, pre-registered on Walrus. Fetch it from a public aggregator and the content matches; the signature is valid. Tamper-proof, and impossible to fake.
Providers are ranked by a disclosed, risk-adjusted score — not raw profit. Even our own AI agent is shown underperforming. Nothing is hidden.
GlassBox. Trading you can audit. Live now — built on Sui, for the Encode hackathon.
